homepage.heroSubline: Trusted roofing and construction services across North Texas. Quality craftsmanship, unwavering commitment.
homepage.aboutTitle: Built on Trust, Rooted in Fort Worth
aboutText: Rivera Brothers Roofing & Construction isn't just a business; it's a family legacy. Founded over a decade ago right here in Fort Worth, we started with a simple goal: to provide honest, reliable roofing services to our neighbors. We've grown since then, but our core values remain the same.

We approach every project, from minor repairs to complete roof replacements, with meticulous detail and open communication. We believe in doing the job right the first time, using only premium materials and proven techniques. Our team is dedicated to exceeding expectations, ensuring your peace of mind.

We're proud to be a part of the Fort Worth community. We support local schools and charities, and we're committed to giving back to the city that has given us so much. When you choose Rivera Brothers, you're choosing a company that cares about its neighbors.

valueProps.title: Local Expertise
valueProps.description: We understand Fort Worth's unique climate and housing styles, ensuring the best solutions for your property.

valueProps.title: Quality Materials
valueProps.description: We use only top-grade materials from trusted suppliers, guaranteeing lasting durability and performance.

valueProps.title: Experienced Crews
valueProps.description: Our skilled and certified professionals deliver exceptional craftsmanship on every project.

valueProps.title: Transparent Pricing
valueProps.description: We provide clear, detailed estimates with no hidden fees, so you know exactly what to expect.

homepage.ctaSubline: Schedule a free roofing inspection and consultation. Let us show you the Rivera Brothers difference.

services.name: Roof Repair
services.shortDescription: Fast, reliable roof repair services to protect your Fort Worth home from the elements.
services.description:
From minor leaks to storm damage, Rivera Brothers Roofing & Construction provides comprehensive roof repair services for Fort Worth homeowners. We understand the challenges posed by Texas weather, including intense sun, hail, and high winds. Our experienced technicians quickly diagnose the problem and implement effective solutions to prevent further damage and costly repairs.

We handle all types of roof repairs, including shingle replacement, leak detection and repair, flashing repair, and chimney repair. We use only high-quality materials that are designed to withstand the harsh Texas climate. We work on all types of residential roofs, including asphalt shingle, tile, and metal roofs.

Our commitment is to provide prompt, professional service and restore your roof to its optimal condition. We'll provide a thorough inspection to identify all underlying issues and offer a detailed estimate before starting any work. Trust Rivera Brothers to keep your home safe and dry.
process: Step 1: Thorough roof inspection to identify all damage and potential problems.
Step 2: Detailed estimate outlining the scope of work and associated costs.
Step 3: Expert repair using high-quality materials and proven techniques.
Step 4: Final inspection to ensure the repair is completed to our high standards.
benefits: Prevents further damage and costly repairs
Extends the life of your roof
Maintains the value of your home
Provides peace of mind knowing your home is protected

faq.question: How quickly can you respond to a roof repair emergency?
faq.answer: We prioritize emergency roof repairs and strive to respond as quickly as possible, often within hours. Call us immediately, and we'll dispatch a team to assess the damage and provide temporary protection if needed.

faq.question: What types of roof repairs do you handle?
faq.answer: We handle all types of roof repairs, including shingle replacement, leak detection and repair, flashing repair, chimney repair, and storm damage repair. No job is too big or too small.

faq.question: Do you offer a warranty on your roof repair services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a warranty on all our roof repair services. The specific warranty details will vary depending on the type of repair and materials used. We'll provide you with complete warranty information before starting any work.

services.name: Roof Replacement
services.shortDescription: Upgrade your Fort Worth home with a durable, beautiful new roof from Rivera Brothers.
services.description:
Is your roof showing its age? Has it sustained significant damage from hail or wind? Rivera Brothers Roofing & Construction provides expert roof replacement services for homeowners in Fort Worth and surrounding areas. We understand that roof replacement is a significant investment, and we're committed to making the process as smooth and stress-free as possible.

We offer a wide selection of roofing materials, including asphalt shingles, tile, metal, and more. Our experienced team will help you choose the right material to match your home's style and budget. We handle every aspect of the roof replacement process, from removing the old roof to installing the new one with precision and care. We ensure proper ventilation and flashing to protect your home from water damage and extend the life of your new roof.

We're committed to using only high-quality materials from trusted suppliers. We'll provide a detailed estimate with transparent pricing, so you know exactly what to expect. Trust Rivera Brothers to deliver a beautiful, durable new roof that will protect your home for years to come.
process: Step 1: Thorough inspection of your existing roof to assess its condition.
Step 2: Consultation to discuss your roofing options and budget.
Step 3: Removal of the old roof and preparation of the roof deck.
Step 4: Installation of the new roof with meticulous attention to detail.
benefits: Increases the value of your home
Provides superior protection from the elements

faq.question: How long does a roof replacement typically take?
faq.answer: The duration of a roof replacement depends on several factors, including the size of the roof, the type of roofing material, and the weather conditions. However, most roof replacements can be completed in 2-5 days.

faq.question: Do I need to be home during the roof replacement process?
faq.answer: It's not necessary for you to be home during the roof replacement process, but we recommend that someone be available to answer any questions or concerns that may arise.

faq.question: What type of warranty do you offer on roof replacements?
faq.answer: We offer a comprehensive warranty on all our roof replacements, covering both materials and workmanship. The specific warranty details will vary depending on the roofing material you choose.

services.name: Roof Inspections
services.shortDescription: Comprehensive roof inspections to identify potential problems before they become major issues.
services.description:
Protect your investment with a professional roof inspection from Rivera Brothers Roofing & Construction. Regular roof inspections are essential for identifying potential problems early, preventing costly repairs, and extending the life of your roof. Our certified inspectors provide thorough assessments of your roof's condition, identifying issues such as leaks, damaged shingles, deteriorated flashing, and improper ventilation.

We use advanced techniques and equipment to detect hidden problems that may not be visible to the naked eye. We'll provide you with a detailed report outlining our findings, including photos and recommendations for necessary repairs or maintenance. We inspect all types of roofs, including asphalt shingle, tile, and metal roofs.

Whether you're buying or selling a home, experiencing a leak, or simply want to ensure your roof is in good condition, a roof inspection from Rivera Brothers can provide valuable peace of mind. Schedule your inspection today and protect your home from the elements.
process: Step 1: Visual inspection of the roof from the ground and on the roof surface.
Step 2: Detailed assessment of all roofing components, including shingles, flashing, and ventilation.
Step 3: Identification of any damage, leaks, or potential problems.
Step 4: Comprehensive report outlining our findings and recommendations.
benefits: Extends the life of your roof

faq.question: How often should I have my roof inspected?
faq.answer: We recommend having your roof inspected at least once a year, and after any major weather event such as a hail storm or high winds. Regular inspections can help identify potential problems before they become major issues.

faq.question: What is included in a roof inspection report?
faq.answer: Our roof inspection reports include a detailed assessment of your roof's condition, including photos and recommendations for necessary repairs or maintenance. We'll also provide you with an estimate for any recommended work.

faq.question: How much does a roof inspection cost?
faq.answer: The cost of a roof inspection depends on the size and complexity of your roof. Contact us today for a free quote.

services.name: Gutter Services
services.shortDescription: Protect your home's foundation with professional gutter installation, repair, and cleaning.
services.description:
Rivera Brothers Roofing & Construction offers comprehensive gutter services to protect your Fort Worth home from water damage. Gutters play a crucial role in directing rainwater away from your foundation, preventing erosion, leaks, and other costly problems. We provide expert gutter installation, repair, and cleaning services to ensure your gutters are functioning properly.

We offer a variety of gutter styles and materials to match your home's architecture and budget. Our experienced technicians will install your gutters with precision and care, ensuring proper slope and drainage. We also provide gutter repair services to fix leaks, sagging gutters, and other issues. Regular gutter cleaning is essential for preventing clogs and maintaining proper drainage. We'll remove leaves, debris, and other obstructions to keep your gutters flowing freely.

Protect your home's foundation with professional gutter services from Rivera Brothers. Contact us today for a free estimate.
process: Step 1: Inspection of your existing gutters to assess their condition.
Step 2: Recommendation of the best gutter solution for your home.
Step 3: Professional installation or repair of your gutters.
Step 4: Thorough cleaning to ensure proper drainage.
benefits: Extends the life of your roof

faq.question: How often should I clean my gutters?
faq.answer: We recommend cleaning your gutters at least twice a year, in the spring and fall. However, if you have trees near your home, you may need to clean them more frequently.

faq.question: What are the signs that my gutters need to be repaired?
faq.answer: Signs that your gutters need to be repaired include leaks, sagging gutters, and overflowing water.

faq.question: What types of gutters do you offer?
faq.answer: We offer a variety of gutter styles and materials, including aluminum, copper, and vinyl gutters.

services.name: Siding Installation
services.shortDescription: Boost curb appeal and protect your home with durable siding installation services.
services.description:
Rivera Brothers Roofing & Construction provides expert siding installation services to enhance the beauty and protection of your Fort Worth home. New siding can dramatically improve your home's curb appeal, increase its value, and protect it from the elements. We offer a wide selection of siding materials, including vinyl, fiber cement, and wood siding, to match your home's style and budget.

Our experienced technicians will install your siding with precision and care, ensuring a seamless and weather-tight finish. We'll properly prepare the walls, install insulation, and caulk all seams to prevent water damage and improve energy efficiency. We're committed to using only high-quality materials from trusted suppliers. We'll provide a detailed estimate with transparent pricing, so you know exactly what to expect.

Transform your home with professional siding installation from Rivera Brothers. Contact us today for a free consultation.
process: Step 1: Consultation to discuss your siding options and budget.
Step 2: Removal of the old siding and preparation of the walls.
Step 3: Installation of insulation and weather barrier.
Step 4: Installation of the new siding with meticulous attention to detail.
benefits: Increases the value of your home
Protects your home from the elements

faq.question: How long does siding installation typically take?
faq.answer: The duration of siding installation depends on the size of your home and the type of siding you choose. However, most siding installations can be completed in 1-2 weeks.

faq.question: What are the benefits of vinyl siding?
faq.answer: Vinyl siding is a popular choice for its durability, low maintenance, and affordability. It's also resistant to rot, insects, and moisture.

faq.question: Do you offer a warranty on your siding installation services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a comprehensive warranty on all our siding installation services, covering both materials and workmanship. The specific warranty details will vary depending on the siding material you choose.

services.name: Storm Damage Repair
services.shortDescription: Reliable storm damage repair services to restore your home after severe weather events.
services.description:
Fort Worth weather can be unpredictable, and severe storms can cause significant damage to your home. Rivera Brothers Roofing & Construction provides prompt and reliable storm damage repair services to help you restore your property quickly and efficiently. We understand the stress and disruption that storm damage can cause, and we're committed to providing compassionate and professional service.

We handle all types of storm damage, including hail damage, wind damage, and water damage. Our experienced team will assess the damage, provide a detailed estimate, and work directly with your insurance company to streamline the claims process. We offer a full range of repair services, including roof repair, siding repair, gutter repair, and window replacement.

Don't let storm damage compromise the safety and security of your home. Contact Rivera Brothers today for immediate assistance.
process: Step 1: Emergency assessment of the storm damage.
Step 2: Detailed estimate for repairs and insurance claim assistance.
Step 3: Expert repair of all storm-related damage.
Step 4: Final inspection to ensure the repairs are completed to our high standards.
benefits: Restores your home to its pre-storm condition

faq.question: What should I do immediately after my home is damaged by a storm?
faq.answer: Your safety is the top priority. Ensure that you and your family are safe, and then document the damage with photos and videos. Contact your insurance company and Rivera Brothers Roofing & Construction as soon as possible.

faq.question: How long will it take to repair the storm damage to my home?
faq.answer: The duration of the repair process depends on the extent of the damage and the availability of materials. We'll provide you with a realistic timeline after assessing the damage.

faq.question: Can you help me with my insurance claim?
faq.answer: Yes, we have extensive experience working with insurance companies and can help you navigate the claims process. We'll provide you with all the necessary documentation and support to ensure a fair settlement.

services.name: Commercial Roofing
services.shortDescription: Expert commercial roofing services for businesses in Fort Worth and surrounding areas.
services.description:
Rivera Brothers Roofing & Construction provides comprehensive commercial roofing services for businesses in Fort Worth and the surrounding areas. We understand the unique challenges of commercial roofing, and we're committed to providing reliable, cost-effective solutions to protect your investment. Our experienced team handles all types of commercial roofing projects, including new construction, roof replacement, and roof repair.

We offer a wide selection of commercial roofing materials, including TPO, PVC, EPDM, and metal roofing. Our skilled technicians will install your roof with precision and care, ensuring long-lasting performance and protection. We also provide ongoing maintenance and repair services to keep your roof in optimal condition. We understand the importance of minimizing disruption to your business operations, and we'll work efficiently to complete your project on time and within budget.

Protect your business with professional commercial roofing services from Rivera Brothers. Contact us today for a free consultation.
process: Step 1: Thorough inspection of your existing commercial roof.
Step 2: Consultation to discuss your roofing options and budget.
Step 3: Professional installation or repair of your commercial roof.
Step 4: Ongoing maintenance and support to keep your roof in optimal condition.
benefits: Minimizes disruption to your business operations

faq.question: What types of commercial roofing systems do you install?
faq.answer: We install a variety of commercial roofing systems, including TPO, PVC, EPDM, and metal roofing.

faq.question: How often should I have my commercial roof inspected?
faq.answer: We recommend having your commercial roof inspected at least twice a year, and after any major weather event.

faq.question: Do you offer a warranty on your commercial roofing services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a comprehensive warranty on all our commercial roofing services, covering both materials and workmanship. The specific warranty details will vary depending on the roofing system you choose.

serviceAreas.content:
Rivera Brothers Roofing & Construction is proud to offer our comprehensive roofing services to the residents of Dallas, Texas. From the iconic skyline to the charming neighborhoods filled with 1950s ranch-style homes, Dallas presents a diverse range of roofing needs. We understand the challenges posed by Dallas's hot, humid summers and are equipped to provide durable, weather-resistant roofing solutions that protect your home or business. 

Whether you need a roof repair, replacement, or a new installation, our experienced team is committed to delivering exceptional craftsmanship and reliable service. We use only the highest quality materials and employ proven techniques to ensure your roof stands the test of time. Rivera Brothers Roofing & Construction is your trusted partner for all your roofing needs in Dallas.
serviceAreas.localContext: Dallas features many established neighborhoods with charming 1950s ranch homes, requiring specialized roofing solutions to maintain their character and protect against the hot, humid summers.

serviceAreas.content:
Rivera Brothers Roofing & Construction provides expert roofing services to the Plano community. With its many established subdivisions featuring homes built in the 1980s and 90s, Plano presents a unique set of roofing considerations. We understand the common roofing materials and styles used during that era and can provide tailored solutions to address any issues you may be experiencing.

Our team is dedicated to delivering top-notch workmanship and exceptional customer service. We offer a wide range of roofing services, including inspections, repairs, replacements, and new installations. We'll help you choose the best roofing options for your Plano home, considering factors like energy efficiency and durability against the Texas climate. Contact Rivera Brothers Roofing & Construction for reliable roofing solutions in Plano.

reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: Rivera Brothers came out quickly after that crazy hail storm we had in Arlington Heights. They fixed the damaged shingles and even checked for other potential problems. Honest and reliable service!

reviews.name: Robert B.
reviews.text: Needed my gutters cleaned before the spring rains hit Dallas. Rivera Brothers did a great job, cleaned up everything, and the price was fair. Will definitely use them again.

reviews.name: Jessica K.
reviews.text: We had Rivera Brothers replace our old roof in Plano. The whole process was smooth from start to finish. They were professional, communicative, and the new roof looks fantastic! Great job!

reviews.name: David L.
reviews.text: As a first-time home buyer in McKinney, I wanted to get a roof inspection before closing. Rivera Brothers was thorough and explained everything clearly. Helped me feel confident in my purchase.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Rivera Brothers installed new siding on our house in Frisco, and it looks amazing! The crew was efficient and professional, and the price was very competitive. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Michael A.
reviews.text: After a bad storm, Rivera Brothers helped me repair my fence and some roof damage. They worked quickly and efficiently, and were great to work with. They even handled most of the work with my insurance company, which was a huge help!
